Downloaded third-party 3D assets used in this project:

Source: Poly Pizza (https://poly.pizza)
License: Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 (CC-BY 3.0)

Models:
1) Wind turbine by Poly by Google
   Model page: https://poly.pizza/m/6I2DF2AZDgB
   File: wind-turbine.glb

2) Solar Panel by Poly by Google
   Model page: https://poly.pizza/m/ah89Y79JdT
   File: solar-panel.glb

3) Battery by Poly by Google
   Model page: https://poly.pizza/m/9gnjbN0VUUn
   File: battery.glb

4) Power Box by Poly by Google
   Model page: https://poly.pizza/m/WFVjj4vnGg
   File: power-box.glb

5) Power plant, level 2 by Kenny Deriemaeker
   Model page: https://poly.pizza/m/0Ipa29gN-iV
   File: power-plant.glb

6) Large Electric Generator by Poly by Google
   Model page: https://poly.pizza/m/ZPlQHwiqTp
   File: nuclear-generator.glb

7) Multimeter by Poly by Google
   Model page: https://poly.pizza/m/yMU4bpnyME
   File: smart-meter.glb

8) Security Camera by Poly by Google
   Model page: https://poly.pizza/m/a6J7IDufQP
   File: sensor-camera.glb

Please retain attribution if this project is redistributed.
